messages.message:
Happy New Year 2026! 

Thank you for being part of our journey in 2025.
Whether we’ve already worked together or just connected, it truly means a lot.

Wishing you and your business a year filled with growth, clarity, and new opportunities.

Here’s to a strong, healthy, and successful 2026! 

Warm wishes,
Johnny

Hi 
Hope you’re doing well.

Just a quick update — we’ve recently launched several new studio-ready Pilates models, including both sculpt-style and reformer options.
If you’d like, I can share a short overview or the latest catalog for reference.
你好 
希望你一切顺利。

有一个小更新——我们最近推出了几款适合工作室使用的普拉提模型，包括塑形风格和改革器选项。
如果你需要，我可以分享一个简短概述或最新目录供参考。
Sorry we just replaced all our reformer beds 3-4 months ago with brand new ones
